title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: A YouTube commentary claiming that OpenAI's market dominance is eroding due to delays in GPT-6 release, while competitors Microsoft, Apple, and Google have shifted to alternative models. The video discusses GPT-6 rumors, benchmark performance across models including Claude and Gemini, and broader industry consolidation.
writeup: This AI Master commentary argues that OpenAI's market dominance is eroding as GPT-6 faces delays, with Microsoft, Apple, and Google having shifted toward alternative models. It surveys GPT-6 rumors and compares benchmark performance across models including Claude and Gemini, set against a backdrop of industry consolidation. The framing matters because it positions GPT-6 as launching into a competitive landscape OpenAI no longer controls, rather than into open territory.
